problem id: 790d2fa8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01101111 -> 01001111
  10110111 -> 11100011
  10101011 -> 00001101
  10110000 -> 11011000
  11110111 -> 11000011
  10001011 -> 00011101
  00101100 -> 01110110
  10010000 -> 11001000
  10110001 -> 11010000
  11101001 -> 00111100

query: 10010010
predicted answer: 11011001
